description_long: This is a modern mid-rise skyscraper with a rectangular footprint, featuring a clean, minimalist facade dominated by white and gray tones. The building rises approximately nine stories above a landscaped base, with a prominent entrance and a series of balconies on one side. The front facade is punctuated by regularly spaced windows and a recessed section that adds visual depth. The rear of the building includes a private outdoor area with a swimming pool, patio seating, and greenery, suggesting amenities for residents or tenants. The structure is surrounded by a paved road and sidewalks, with small landscaped areas and parking spaces for vehicles. The overall design emphasizes functionality and contemporary urban living, with a focus on geometric lines and efficient use of space.
description: A modern, nine-story skyscraper with a white and gray facade, regular windows, balconies, and a landscaped base featuring a pool and patio. The building is surrounded by roads, sidewalks, and parking spaces, reflecting a contemporary urban style.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance, a landscaped area with shrubs, and a driveway with parked cars. The facade features regular windows and a recessed balcony section.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a mostly solid wall with minimal windows, and a glimpse of the pool and patio area at the rear.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the outdoor amenities, including a swimming pool, patio seating, and green space, as well as the building's regular window pattern.
description_view_3: The right side view displays the full height of the building, the main entrance, and the landscaped area with trees, as well as the road and parking spaces.
attribute_facade_design: The facade features smooth white and gray surfaces with regular rectangular windows, accented by recessed balconies and minimal ornamentation. The base includes landscaped greenery and a clean, geometric entrance canopy.
